message:
feat(cli): add --no-color flag and random command

- Add global --no-color flag to disable colored output (respects NO_COLOR env)
- Add jfp random command for serendipitous prompt discovery
  - Supports --category and --tag filters
  - Optional --copy flag to copy to clipboard
  - JSON output support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
